job.title: IT Project Manager
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Lead large-scale IT projects in Lyon in a multi-client context. You ensure deliverable quality and customer satisfaction.
mission.1: Scope IT projects and define milestones
profile.1: Master's degree (Bac+5) in Computer Science or Project Management
profile.2: 3 to 7 years of experience managing information systems projects
profile.3: Proficiency in Agile methods and V-model delivery
profile.4: Certification PMP ou Scrum Master is a plus
profile.5: Mobility and strong client service mindset
